title: Add /login and /register HTTP endpoints
description: Create POST /register and POST /login HTTP route handlers that expose the existing auth business logic as REST endpoints. The existing register() and login() functions in src/api/auth/ are already implemented but lack Next.js route handlers. New routes should follow the existing pattern in src/app/api/*/route.ts using NextRequest/NextResponse and getPayloadInstance().
existing_patterns: src/app/api/notes/route.ts - Next.js App Router route pattern with GET/POST exports, uses getPayloadInstance(), withAuth HOC, and returns JSON responses with proper status codes
src/api/auth/login.ts - Existing login() business logic that validates credentials and returns accessToken/refreshToken
src/api/auth/register.ts - Existing register() business logic that creates users with email/password and returns tokens
src/auth/jwt-service.ts - TokenPayload interface with userId, email, role, sessionId, generation fields
